description_short: Sleep comfortable and cozy all year round with our 200 GSM Virgin Microfiber All Season Reversible Comforter.

construction_layers.name: Cover Fabric
construction_layers.notes: Soft and breathable, both sides usable (reversible).

construction_layers.name: Filling
construction_layers.notes: Lightweight and warm. Total fill weight 200 GSM.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash in warm water with mild detergent.

proprietary_tech.name: Moisture Wicking
proprietary_tech.description: Fabric pulls moisture away to dry quickly.

faq_specs.question: Will the Reversible Comforter keep me warm?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, it's designed for all seasons; it keeps you warm without causing night sweats.

faq_specs.question: What does Moisture Wicking mean?
faq_specs.answer: Moisture wicking means the fabric dries quickly and pulls sweat away.
